prompt: I have an existing T-Systems portfolio at the project path provided. Create customer profiles for the grosse-energieversorger-de market. After generation, run the closed review loop with two eval-layer reviewers: CSO (customers-cso-reviewer) evaluates sales actionability, and Market Expert (customers-market-expert-reviewer) evaluates market accuracy. Loop until both reviewers score avg >= 4.0 with no dimension below 3, or maximum 3 iterations. Track score progression in convergence.json.

assertions.text: Final Market Expert reviewer avg score >= 4.0
No dimension below 3 in final round
Score improvement between rounds (avg increases or stays >= threshold)
